- Change homepage hero to Cruz Invitational 2026
- Update theme color from red \(#B40F0E\) to purple \(#8B2BE2\)
- Update all blog posts with purple accent colors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
